name: raio-design-agent-v2-clean
description: Reference-first, foundation-first visual design agent for RaiO Studio / RaiOS.

interface.shortDescription: Reference-first and foundation-first UI design agent.
interface.longDescription: A stricter RaiO design agent focused on reference fidelity, typography, palette, spacing and component quality before custom enrichment.
defaultPrompt: Use the RaiO Design Agent V2 to design this UI.
Select references, define foundation, then build.
Review this UI against reference fidelity.
